cxu_object.claim: A volatile market regime is characterized by wide price swings with no clear directional bias featuring rapid reversals and expanded Bollinger bands occurring approximately ten to twenty percent of the time typically during US trading sessions

supporting_contexts.text: Volatile: wide swings, no clear direction. 10-20% of time. US session (14:00-20:00 UTC) produces the most volatile conditions with widest ranges and most frequent regime transitions.
Regime-adaptive strategy uses partial position sizing (0.5) in volatile regimes and applies defensive playbook. No single strategy wins all regimes — the edge is in regime classification.

hierarchy.document_title: AgDel Trading Wiki — One Week Intensive Results

frequencyPct.description: Expected percentage of time market spends in volatile regime

positionSizeMultiplier.description: Position size multiplier during volatile regime (1.0 = full, 0.5 = half)

version.change_description: Initial regime model for volatile markets based on one week ETH-USD observation
